mapper.insert: INSERT INTO score_record (tenant_id, leaderboard_id, instance_id, metric_id, user_id, score, payload) VALUES (#{tenantId}, #{leaderboardId}, #{instanceId}, #{metricId}, #{userId}, #{score}, #{payload})

INSERT INTO score_record (tenant_id, leaderboard_id, instance_id, metric_id, user_id, score, payload) VALUES
(#{r.tenantId}, #{r.leaderboardId}, #{r.instanceId}, #{r.metricId}, #{r.userId}, #{r.score}, #{r.payload})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM score_record WHERE leaderboard_id = #{leaderboardId} AND instance_id = #{instanceId}
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) FROM score_record WHERE leaderboard_id = #{leaderboardId} AND instance_id = #{instanceId}
